benchmark_design.kernel_microbench: Optional synthetic operator benchmark. Keep it separate from end-to-end workload results.
benchmark_design.shared_backbone_runtime: Grouped LoRA runtime under the currently launched topology. On torchrun this is the DDP-style path.
benchmark_design.single_gpu_reference: Single-GPU grouped-versus-serial baseline intended to mirror paper-style one-GPU PEFT comparisons.
benchmark_design.multi_gpu_local_colocation: Local-only multi-GPU packing benchmark: jobs are sharded across GPUs, and each GPU runs without DDP.
benchmark_design.matched_multi_adapter_reference: Same-workload correctness and performance reference against the project's baseline LoRA path when rank and alpha match.

workload.description: Six equal-rank adapters across diverse instruction-tuning task families in a throughput-oriented grouped regime.

multi_gpu_local_colocation.reason: Requires more than one launched process.

workload.description: Six diverse adapters with skewed ranks in a memory-aware grouped regime that caps co-scheduled group size.

multi_gpu_local_colocation.reason: Requires more than one launched process.

matched_multi_adapter_reference.reason: Matched multi-adapter baseline currently requires all jobs to share the same rank and alpha.
